name: evidence aggregator counts a consortium reviewer affiliation as the consortium's member organizations rather than as a single org
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache && printf '{"login":"finos-reviewer","consortium":"finos","member_orgs":["jpmc","goldman","stripe"],"fetched_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache/finos-reviewer.json && printf '{"pattern_id":"p5","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"reviewer":"finos-reviewer","tier":1}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json --resolve-consortia --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'organizations_count=3' out.txt && grep -q 'jpmc' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
